posts.text: what makes the company attractive and enthusiastic even after company had done total dilution 5 times before - however also adding the impact on the company after dilution to assess whether the company is on a Right track or are still some lagging indicators seen? The second question which i would like to ask after assessing past impacts whether or not what led company to think that a one more dilution would help the company to reach sky highs because a company is on a runway of Rs.1900 crore and managemnt is claiming that after dilution , the money which they will be able to receive is utilis…
